_meta.source: SlaveVoyages.org consolidated voyage database (Trans-Atlantic + Intra-American), imputed (IMP) variables.
_meta.license: CC-BY-NC; cite the Slave Voyages Consortium.
_meta.anchors: historical coastal regions (explicit lon/lat), NOT modern states
_meta.departure_ports_note: Top 25 fitting-out ports by voyages (imputed port the voyage began from) — the closest data signal to who ORGANISED the trade. Counted across all voyages with a known port; no explicit political-sponsor field exists in the source.
